title: DEKTON VDE Cordless 3.6v Li-Ion Mini Electric Screwdriver Set – 48pcs with USB-C Rechargeable Battery, 200rpm, Led Light, 1/4" Quick Release Chuck, Storage Case & Flexible Shaft
features: Cordless & Rechargeable Design – Powered by a 3.6V 1500mAh Li-Ion Battery with Type-C USB Charging, this mini electric screwdriver offers up to 200RPM no-load speed and 2.0N.M max torque for efficient performance on everyday DIY projects.

Push & Twist Control – Easy-to-use design with push and twist operation provides smooth screwdriving action. The 1/4" quick release chuck allows fast bit changes, while the built-in LED light ensures accuracy even in low-light working conditions.

Full 48-Piece Kit Included – Comes with 30pcs 25mm bits, 4pcs 50mm bits, 2pcs hex drills, 9pcs sockets, 1pc bit holder, and a 250mm flexible shaft, giving you everything needed for home repairs, furniture assembly, and detailed DIY work.

Durable & Portable Storage Case – Organised in a compact carry case, this screwdriver set keeps all accessories neatly in place, preventing loss and making it easy to transport. Ideal for keeping tools accessible for jobs around the home.

Multi-Purpose Diy Tool – Perfect for assembling flat-pack furniture, fixing appliances, tightening screws, and carrying out precision household repairs. Designed for homeowners, hobbyists, and DIY enthusiasts who value efficiency and convenience.
description: The DEKTON VDE Cordless 3.6V Li-Ion Battery Mini Electric Screwdriver Set is designed to make everyday DIY and household repairs quick and easy. Powered by a 1500mAh Li-Ion battery, it charges via Type-C USB in 3–5 hours, delivering up to 200RPM with a maximum torque of 2.0N.M. Its push-and-twist operation ensures smooth control, while the 1/4" quick release chuck allows fast bit changes. An integrated LED light brightens your workspace, making screwdriving simple even in low-light conditions. This 48-piece kit includes 30pcs 25mm bits, 4pcs 50mm bits, 2pcs hex drills, 9pcs sockets, a bit holder, and a 250mm flexible shaft, all neatly packed in a durable carry case. Perfect for assembling furniture, fixing electronics, or general household maintenance, this compact yet powerful screwdriver set is a reliable companion for homeowners, hobbyists, and DIY enthusiasts who want precision, efficiency, and convenience.
